name: Pumpkin Rice & Apricots
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Onion; peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Or can substitute butternut or buttercup squash or sweet potatoes.
Melt butter in a wide skillet over medium heat. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it begins to brown. Peel and cube pumpkin to about 1 inch pieces. Add pieces to skillet as you prepare it. Stir to coat with butter. Chop apricots and add to skillet along with salt and 3/4 cup water. Cover and simmer the mixture for 15 minutes. Add cooked rice and cook an additional 10 minutes, or until pumpkin is tender. Stir often while cooking.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
